fields.summary: Fills the provided span with the current normalized variation coordinates for the font.
fields.returns: The number of coordinates written into <paramref name="coords" />.

params.coords: The span to receive the normalized variation coordinates.

fields.summary: Sets the variation coordinates for the font using design-space values.

params.coords: The design-space coordinate values, one per variation axis.

fields.summary: Sets the variation coordinates for the font using normalized values.

params.coords: The normalized coordinate values (typically in the range -16384 to 16384), one per variation axis.

fields.summary: Applies the variation coordinates of the specified named instance to the font.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.summary: Sets the variation axes for the font using the specified variation settings.

params.variations: The variation settings to apply, each identifying an axis tag and a design-space value.

fields.summary: Gets the current normalized variation coordinates for the font.
fields.value: An array of normalized coordinate values, or an empty array if no variation coordinates have been set.
